trending_videos.title: Avatar: Seven Havens | Official Teaser | Paramount+ (SDCC 2026)
trending_videos.description:
Avatar: Seven Havens premieres October 9 only on Paramount+.

Avatar: Seven Havens is an all-new series from creators Michael Dante DiMartino and Bryan Konietzko. Set in a world shattered by a devastating cataclysm, a young Earthbender discovers she's the new Avatar after Korra. In this dangerous era, that title marks her as humanity's destroyer, not its savior. Hunted by both human and spirit enemies, she and her long-lost twin must uncover their mysterious origins and save the Seven Havens before civilization’s last strongholds collapse.

Watch More Avatar :arrow_right: https://bit.ly/4vDnUE3

Welcome to the Avatar Legends channel – the ultimate home for all things Avatar! Here you will find the best battles, deep dives, and the most memorable moments from all of your favorite characters from Aang to Zuko. On top of that, there will be plenty of Legend of Korra, official Avatar Comics, and even more exciting original content! You don’t need a sky bison to swing on by to the Avatar: T

trending_videos.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
𝙽𝚘 𝚜𝚠𝚎𝚊𝚝.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the official trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. #ResidentEvil

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qiz

trending_videos.title: EA SPORTS FC 27 | Official Reveal Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Welcome to The World’s Game. EA SPORTS FC™ 27 launches 25 September. Pre-order now: https://x.ea.com/89600

Step into The Grounds to experience a football playground where the streets meet the stadium, and feel greater control in every mode as community-driven innovations deliver more true-to-football gameplay: https://x.ea.com/89601

Learn more about FC 27 Gameplay, Career, FUT, and Clubs x The Grounds when the Deep Dives series kicks off July 29th.

Pre-order EA SPORTS FC 27™ Ultimate Plus Edition by 31 August: https://x.ea.com/89600

Receive up to 10,000 FC Points across 5 months, Seasons 1 - 5 of the Premium Pass, and more. EA SPORTS FC 26™ players will also receive a 92+ OVR ICON in EA SPORTS FC™ 26 Football Ultimate Team™ for immediate use and an Evolution that boosts any player’s dribbling Attributes to 99.

Subscribe to see more from EA SPORTS FC™: http://bit.ly/pzw4VD

#EASPORTSFC #TheWorldsGame #FC27

trending_videos.title: Clayface | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Meet the new face of Gotham. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters October 23.

DC Studios’ “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the cult favorite villain from Gotham’s rogues gallery.

Matt Hagen’s meteoric rise from Gotham street kid to Hollywood leading man is tragically cut short when a local crime boss’s actions leave him horribly disfigured. Abandoned by his team and with nothing left, Matt seeks out a cutting edge treatment that miraculously returns him to his former self… but also unexpectedly affects his grip on reality, spiraling him down a destructive path of all-consuming revenge.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James.

James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Mic

Nostalgia_and_Franchises.description: Videos related to popular franchises or characters from the past, such as 'Avatar' and 'Resident Evil', are trending.
Nostalgia_and_Franchises.insights: Leveraging well-known franchises can drive high viewer engagement. Consider producing content that taps into existing fan bases.

Gaming_and_Game_Trailers.description: Gaming content, especially related to popular franchises like 'Black Ops 2 Zombies' and 'EA SPORTS FC 27', shows strong viewership.
Gaming_and_Game_Trailers.insights: Creators should focus on high-demand gaming content, collaborate with game developers for exclusive content, or produce commentary and Easter egg videos.

Movie_and_Series_Trailers.description: Trailers for movies and series, such as 'Ebenezer' and 'Clayface', are gaining significant traction.
Movie_and_Series_Trailers.insights: Timely release of trailers and behind-the-scenes content can capitalize on the anticipation for upcoming releases.

Interactive_and_Story-Driven_Content.description: Interactive videos or videos with a strong narrative, like 'Photomaly' and 'WE GOT KIDNAPPED in Animal Hospital Anomaly', are engaging viewers.
Interactive_and_Story-Driven_Content.insights: Invest in unique storytelling techniques or interactive content to differentiate from traditional formats.

collaboration.description: Work with popular channels or personalities to reach larger audiences.
collaboration.example: Collaborations like those involving 'Avatar Legends' can cross-promote content across different fan bases.

branding.description: Strong brand identity and leveraging popular IPs can enhance visibility.
branding.example: Channels like 'Sony Pictures Entertainment' use well-established brands to attract viewers.

untapped_potentials: Virtual Reality and Augmented Reality Content

VR_and_AR_Content.description: Explore creating VR experiences or AR filters related to trending franchises.
VR_and_AR_Content.potential_audience: Tech-savvy audiences and gamers looking for immersive experiences.

Esports_and_Competitive_Gaming.description: Develop content around esports events or tournaments, especially in popular gaming franchises.
Esports_and_Competitive_Gaming.potential_audience: Young audiences and competitive gaming enthusiasts.

Localized_Content.description: Produce localized versions of popular trailers or content to capture non-English speaking markets.
Localized_Content.potential_audience: International audiences who are fans of global franchises.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
